Class: Ol3Map

bemap.Ol3Map(context, target)

Base class for OpenLayers v3.

Constructor

new Ol3Map(context, target)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context.
target string HTML element.
options.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v10/bemap-map-ol3.js, line 17

Extends

  • bemap.Map

Members

(protected) _zoomControlVisible

Whether the zoom (+/-) control is currently visible. Initialised from the resolved `zoomControl` option (default OFF — opt-in) and flipped at runtime by `setZoomControl()`. Kept in sync so `getZoomControl()` is accurate before any runtime toggle.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_zoomControlVisible
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 52

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#callback
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 43

Source:

Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 28

(protected) native

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#native
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 23

Methods

(protected) _fireError(err)

Fire an error onto the map's error channel(s). Used by the warn-and-no-op fallback and by the new auth/tile/cache error paths.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
err bemap.Error
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_fireError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1432

_onError()

Subscribe to the map's error channel. Accepts the unfiltered channel `'error'` and three filtered channels: - `'error:auth'` — `UNAUTHORIZED` / `FORBIDDEN` - `'error:network'` — `NETWORK` / `OFFLINE` / `RATE_LIMITED` / `TILE_LOAD_FAILED` / `STYLE_LOAD_FAILED` - `'error:maplibre-only'`— `MAPLIBRE_ONLY` The library version of `on()` calls this when the event name starts with `'error'`; for other event names it delegates to the engine-specific implementation (see `LeafletMap.on`, `OlMap.on`, `MapLibreMap.on`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_onError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1462

(protected) _requiresGlobe()

Emit a one-time `info`-level error on the map's error channel when a `setLight` / `setSky` / etc. is called on a non-globe projection where the effect won't be visible. NOT auto-enabling globe — too surprising for a public API. The customer's error subscriber sees the hint; dev console gets a one-time `console.info`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_requiresGlobe
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1632

addDrawControl(options) → {bemap.Map}

Add a drawing toolbar to the map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
polygon boolean Enable polygon drawing (default: true).
polyline boolean Enable polyline drawing (default: false).
rectangle boolean Enable rectangle drawing (default: false).
circle boolean Enable circle drawing (default: false).
marker boolean Enable marker drawing (default: false).
position String Toolbar position: 'topright','topleft','bottomright','bottomleft' (default: 'topright').
onDrawEnd function Callback when a shape is drawn.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#addDrawControl
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1273
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

Type
bemap.Map

clearAllEffects() → {bemap.Map}

Tear down every registered effect. Invokes each teardown in registration order, swallowing errors per-teardown so one failure doesn't block the rest. Each teardown is expected to call `_unregisterEffect` itself via the matching `remove*`/`stop*` path; the registry is cleared at the end regardless.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#clearAllEffects
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1605
Returns:
Type
bemap.Map

layer bemap.Layer the layer object to clear.

this

Draw a polygon interactively. User clicks vertices, double-clicks to finish.

Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
style bemap.PolygonStyle Style for the preview polygon.
callback function Called with bemap.MapEvent when drawing is complete. evt.bemapObject = bemap.Polygon.

getActiveEffects() → {Array.<String>}

Names of every currently-active effect. Snapshot — does not auto- update; subscribe via `onEffectChange` for live notification.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#getActiveEffects
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1586

(abstract) on(eventType, callback, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Name Type Description
eventType bemap.Map.EventType Event type.
callback function Function will be called when the specified eventType is occur.
options object options.

Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 863
Returns:
this.
Type
bemap.Listener

onEffectChange()

Subscribe to active-effect changes. Fires `{name, active}` whenever an effect is registered (`active: true`) or torn down (`active: false`). The dashboard's active-effects bar consumes this.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onEffectChange
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1566

onGetFeatureInfo(layer, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Set get feature info call back.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
layer bemap.Layer set the bemap layer.
options object options.
Properties
Name Type Description
beforeCallback function callback called at data reception and before display the popup.
afterCallback function callback called after display the popup.

  • bemap.Map#onGetFeatureInfo
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 942
Returns:
listener;

setCoordinatePopup(popup, coordinate, options) → {bemap.Map}

Set the coordinate of the popup.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
popup bemap.Popup the popup of wich to set the coordinate.
coordinate bemap.Coordinate the new coordinate.
options object Options.
Properties
Name Type Description
panningMap bemap.Layer enable the map panning animation. move map from the current position to the popup anchor at the center of map.

  • bemap.Map#setCoordinatePopup
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1056
Returns:
this.
Type
bemap.Map

(abstract) setDragPan(active) → {bemap.Map}

Enable or disable the drag pan of map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
active boolean true to enable the drag pan of map, otherwise false.
options.dragPan. Object

  • bemap.Map#setDragPan

  • bemap-map.js, line 600
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

Name Type Description
options object Light options (position, color, intensity, anchor).

  • bemap.Map#setLight

bemap.Map

Name Type Description
pitch number Pitch angle (0-85).

  • bemap.Map#setPitch
Source:

Set the visiblility of the popup.

Name Type Description
popup bemap.Popup the popup.

Source:

Returns:

Type
bemap.Popup

setZoomControl(enabled) → {bemap.Map}

Show or hide the engine's native zoom (+/-) buttons at runtime. Uniform across Leaflet, OpenLayers and MapLibre — toggles a class on the map container so the engine-specific selectors all hit at once.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
enabled Boolean
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#setZoomControl
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 219
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

Name Type Description
geoserver String Name of geoserver.

  • bemap.Map#switchBackgroundLayer

bemap.Map

bemap.Ol3Map(context, target)

Base class for OpenLayers v3.

Constructor

new Ol3Map(context, target)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
context bemap.Context BeMap-JS-API Context.
target string HTML element.
options.
Source:
  • bemap-ol/bemap-ol-v4/bemap-map-ol3.js, line 17

Extends

  • bemap.Map

Members

(protected) _zoomControlVisible

Whether the zoom (+/-) control is currently visible. Initialised from the resolved `zoomControl` option (default OFF — opt-in) and flipped at runtime by `setZoomControl()`. Kept in sync so `getZoomControl()` is accurate before any runtime toggle.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_zoomControlVisible
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 52

(protected) callback

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#callback
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 43

(protected) ctx

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#ctx
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 18

(protected) events

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#events
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 33

(protected) layers

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#layers
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 28

(protected) native

Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#native
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 23

Methods

(protected) _fireError(err)

Fire an error onto the map's error channel(s). Used by the warn-and-no-op fallback and by the new auth/tile/cache error paths.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
err bemap.Error
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_fireError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1432

_onError()

Subscribe to the map's error channel. Accepts the unfiltered channel `'error'` and three filtered channels: - `'error:auth'` — `UNAUTHORIZED` / `FORBIDDEN` - `'error:network'` — `NETWORK` / `OFFLINE` / `RATE_LIMITED` / `TILE_LOAD_FAILED` / `STYLE_LOAD_FAILED` - `'error:maplibre-only'`— `MAPLIBRE_ONLY` The library version of `on()` calls this when the event name starts with `'error'`; for other event names it delegates to the engine-specific implementation (see `LeafletMap.on`, `OlMap.on`, `MapLibreMap.on`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_onError
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1462

(protected) _requiresGlobe()

Emit a one-time `info`-level error on the map's error channel when a `setLight` / `setSky` / etc. is called on a non-globe projection where the effect won't be visible. NOT auto-enabling globe — too surprising for a public API. The customer's error subscriber sees the hint; dev console gets a one-time `console.info`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#_requiresGlobe
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1632

add3DBuildings(options) → {bemap.Map}

Add 3D extruded buildings. MapLibre only.

Name Type Description
options object Building configuration.

  • bemap.Map#add3DBuildings

addDrawControl(options) → {bemap.Map}

Add a drawing toolbar to the map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below.
Properties
Name Type Description
polygon boolean Enable polygon drawing (default: true).
polyline boolean Enable polyline drawing (default: false).
rectangle boolean Enable rectangle drawing (default: false).
circle boolean Enable circle drawing (default: false).
marker boolean Enable marker drawing (default: false).
position String Toolbar position: 'topright','topleft','bottomright','bottomleft' (default: 'topright').
onDrawEnd function Callback when a shape is drawn.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#addDrawControl
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1273
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

LineStyle bemap.LineStyle
options object
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#buildLineStyle
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 771
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

clearAllEffects() → {bemap.Map}

Tear down every registered effect. Invokes each teardown in registration order, swallowing errors per-teardown so one failure doesn't block the rest. Each teardown is expected to call `_unregisterEffect` itself via the matching `remove*`/`stop*` path; the registry is cleared at the end regardless.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#clearAllEffects
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1605
Returns:
Type
bemap.Map

(abstract) clearLayer(layer) → {bemap.Map}

Remove all objects from a layer.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
layer bemap.Layer the layer object to clear.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#clearLayer
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 815
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

  • bemap.Map#clearPopup

this;

getActiveEffects() → {Array.<String>}

Names of every currently-active effect. Snapshot — does not auto- update; subscribe via `onEffectChange` for live notification.

  • bemap.Map#getActiveEffects

(abstract) on(eventType, callback, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Set the listner when an specified eventType occur on bemap.Map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
eventType bemap.Map.EventType Event type.
callback function Function will be called when the specified eventType is occur.
options object options.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#on
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 863
Returns:
this.
Type
bemap.Listener

onEffectChange()

Subscribe to active-effect changes. Fires `{name, active}` whenever an effect is registered (`active: true`) or torn down (`active: false`). The dashboard's active-effects bar consumes this.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onEffectChange
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1566

onGetFeatureInfo(layer, options) → {bemap.Listener}

Set get feature info call back.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
layer bemap.Layer set the bemap layer.
options object options.
Properties
Name Type Description
beforeCallback function callback called at data reception and before display the popup.
afterCallback function callback called after display the popup.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#onGetFeatureInfo
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 942
Returns:
listener;
Type
bemap.Listener

bemap.Listener

queryRenderedFeatures(point, options) → {Array}

Query rendered features at a point or in a box. MapLibre only.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
point object Screen point or bounding box.
options object Query options (layers, filter).
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#queryRenderedFeatures
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1189
Returns:
Array of feature objects.
Type
Array

Set the bearing (compass rotation) of the map. MapLibre only.

Name Type Description
bearing number Bearing in degrees (0-360).

  • bemap.Map#setBearing
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1096

Type
bemap.Map

setCoordinatePopup(popup, coordinate, options) → {bemap.Map}

Set the coordinate of the popup.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
popup bemap.Popup the popup of wich to set the coordinate.
coordinate bemap.Coordinate the new coordinate.
options object Options.
Properties
Name Type Description
panningMap bemap.Layer enable the map panning animation. move map from the current position to the popup anchor at the center of map.
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#setCoordinatePopup
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 1056
Returns:
this.
Type
bemap.Map

(abstract) setDragPan(active) → {bemap.Map}

Enable or disable the drag pan of map.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
active boolean true to enable the drag pan of map, otherwise false.
options.dragPan. Object

  • bemap.Map#setDragPan

Name Type Description

Set the visiblility of the popup.

Name Type Description
popup bemap.Popup the popup.
visible Boolean true for visible and false for hidden.

  • bemap.Map#setVisiblePopup
Source:

Returns:
this.
Type
bemap.Popup

setZoomControl(enabled) → {bemap.Map}

Show or hide the engine's native zoom (+/-) buttons at runtime. Uniform across Leaflet, OpenLayers and MapLibre — toggles a class on the map container so the engine-specific selectors all hit at once.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
enabled Boolean
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Overrides:
  • bemap.Map#setZoomControl
Source:
  • bemap-map.js, line 219
Returns:
this
Type
bemap.Map

Name Type Description
geoserver String Name of geoserver.

  • bemap.Map#switchBackgroundLayer

bemap.Map

Name Type Description
id string Source identifier.
data object New GeoJSON data.
